creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Boards we currently provide release images for (11.x):

* arm-GUMSTIX
* armv6-BANANAPI
* armv6-BEAGLEBONE
* armv6-CUBIEBOARD
* armv6-CUBIEBOARD2
* armv6-CUBOX-HUMMINGBOARD
* armv6-PANDABOARD
* armv6-RPI-B
* armv6-RPI2
* armv6-WANDBOARD

GUMSTIX is a company, not a model, and I'm not sure which specific board it is, but I strongly suspect we can drop everything pre-armv6 at least.
